JavaScript strict mode tests for `arguments`, `eval`, `let`, `delete`, escape sequences, labelled statements, objects, octal literals, parameter duplication, and exception handling.


## Files
- **[arguments-assignment-strict.js](arguments-assignment-strict.js.md)**: Tests strict mode error when assigning a value to the `arguments` object.
- **[arguments-catch-strict.js](arguments-catch-strict.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of using 'arguments' as a catch parameter in strict mode.
- **[arguments-in-prop-set-param-list-strict.js](arguments-in-prop-set-param-list-strict.js.md)**: Tests strict mode behavior for setting a property with 'arguments' as a parameter name.
- **[arguments-in-var-decl-strict.js](arguments-in-var-decl-strict.js.md)**: Tests strict mode behavior when declaring a variable named 'arguments'.
- **[arguments-param-strict.js](arguments-param-strict.js.md)**: A test file for strict mode function parameter handling in JavaScript.
- **[arguments-postfix-strict.js](arguments-postfix-strict.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of incrementing the `arguments` object in strict mode.
- **[arguments-prefix-strict.js](arguments-prefix-strict.js.md)**: A test file that uses strict mode to increment the `arguments` object, which is not allowed.
- **[delete-strict.js](delete-strict.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the delete operator in strict mode.

- **[escape-sequences-invalid-variable.js](escape-sequences-invalid-variable.js.md)**: Tests invalid escape sequences in variable names.

- **[eval-prefix-strict.js](eval-prefix-strict.js.md)**: A test file for strict mode evaluation of prefix increment on `eval`.
- **[func-expr-strict.js](func-expr-strict.js.md)**: A test script for strict mode function expressions using reserved keywords.
